series_metadata.series_title: Applications to participate in Economic Development programs
series_metadata.series_description: Completed applications submitted to the Economic Development department by individuals that wish to participate in one of the linked-deposit programs administered by the department. Documentation includes applicant information, loan details, compliance certifications, and other information that varies based on the specific linked-deposit program to which the applicant is applying.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: applications later of (a) conclusion of fiscal year in which application was submitted, an additional 3 fiscal years, or (b) conclusion of fiscal year in which corresponding loan an approved application was scheduled final payment 1 additional fiscal year. ; Electronic: applications later of (a) conclusion of fiscal year in which application was submitted, an additional 3 fiscal years, or (b) conclusion of fiscal year in which corresponding loan an approved application was scheduled final payment 1 additional fiscal year
